subcodes.first_line: The Ever-Living testifieth that He Who speaketh in this Palace is, verily, the All-Powerful, doing whatsoever He willeth, Who hath created [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد القیوم بان الذی ینطق فی هذا القصر انه لهو المقتدر علی ما یشاء قد خلق
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transcendence; unknowability of God
